description: Jarek Jakubesak discusses common scams and prevention strategies in a Binance Academy webinar. He shares insights from his law enforcement background and emphasizes the importance of awareness regarding prevalent scams, including phishing and crypto doublers.
topic_summary: In this session, Jarek Jakubesak covers prevalent scams in the cryptocurrency space, focusing on phishing sites and crypto doubling schemes, and provides educational insights on how to avoid falling victim to these scams. [t=52:15]
